$comment: NEGATIVE FIXTURE — must be REJECTED when claiming an alias log with a sessionId that was already claimed. The sessionId matches one already in claimedAliasSessions. Claim must reject with CLAIM_DUPLICATE_SESSION.
claimInstructions: Import this file on your home FERROS instance to claim these logs and merge them into your profile.
_invalidReason: sessionId 'tesla-2026-05-01T14:00:00.000Z' is assumed to already exist in the target profile's meta.claimedAliasSessions array. Second import must reject with CLAIM_DUPLICATE_SESSION.
